_comment: Add this block to ~/.claude/settings.json (global) or .claude/settings.json (project-local). Claude Code picks it up automatically on next startup. Replace /absolute/path/to/.kuckuck-key with your actual key file. On a pip install, 'kuckuck' expands to the console script; with the release binary, it expands to the downloaded kuckuck_<os> executable renamed to 'kuckuck' on PATH. Legacy pip installs using the 'kuckuck-mcp' console-script alias still work; binary users only get the 'kuckuck' command (no separate kuckuck-mcp binary exists in the current release).
